projectDescription: A web application for automating all the manual effort on automation testing.
projectFeatures: Access Management with role-based permissions
Project and workspace management
Hierarchical folder system for organizing test cases
Sprint and phase management for agile workflows
Multiple dashboard views including Kanban, Card, Split and List
Real-time auto-save and keystroke tracking
Complete CRUD operations for test cases, bugs and reports
Built-in documentation similar to Confluence
Import and export features for backup and migration
AI-powered test generation from Selenium automation scripts
Automatic bug creation from failed test cases
Integrated messaging and team collaboration
projectOverview:
CafeTest is a comprehensive bug tracking and test management platform designed to automate and streamline software testing workflows. The application integrates modern full stack technologies with AI capabilities to simplify how QA teams manage projects, test cases, bugs, and reports. By combining structured test management with intelligent automation, CafeTest eliminates repetitive manual effort and improves testing efficiency.

The platform includes enterprise-grade capabilities such as role-based access control, project organization, sprint planning, and flexible dashboards. It also integrates AI APIs to automatically generate test cases from Selenium automation scripts and identify failures as bugs. With features like real-time synchronization, collaborative messaging, documentation support, and detailed reporting dashboards, CafeTest acts as a centralized platform for developers, testers, and project managers.
projectKeyFeatures:
AI Test Case Generation from Selenium Scripts
Role-Based Access Management
Multi-view Dashboard (Kanban, Split, Card, List)
Real-time Auto-save with Keystroke Detection
Built-in Messaging & Collaboration
Theme Customization (Dark/Light/System)
VS Code Extension Integration
Import/Export & Sharing Features
projectTimeLine:
Planning & Research - Architecture design and feature planning
Phase 1 Development - Core backend APIs and database structure
Phase 2 Development - Frontend UI, dashboard views, and test management system
Phase 3 Integration - AI APIs, messaging system, and automation workflows
Deployment - Production deployment using Vercel and Render
projectStandOutFeatures: The most unique feature of CafeTest is the VS Code extension integration that leverages Anthropic AI APIs to automatically generate test cases from Selenium automation scripts. It also detects failures during execution and categorizes them as bugs, significantly reducing manual effort in test creation and bug reporting. This makes CafeTest far more intelligent than traditional tools such as Jira and Zephyr.
projectChallenges:
Designing a scalable test case management structure for large projects
Implementing real-time auto-save and synchronization without performance issues
Integrating AI APIs for automated test generation
Building multiple dashboard views with dynamic data handling
Creating a seamless workflow between test execution and bug tracking
projectLessonsLearned:
Improved understanding of scalable full-stack architecture
Learned advanced state management and real-time data handling
Experience integrating AI APIs into practical developer workflows
Deepened knowledge of automation testing workflows and bug management systems
Enhanced UI/UX design for complex dashboard applications
projectFuturePlans:
Add CI/CD integration for automated testing pipelines
Introduce AI-powered bug prioritization and severity prediction
Add advanced analytics dashboards with predictive insights
Integrate additional automation frameworks like Cypress and Playwright
Develop a desktop version using Electron

projectDescription: A full stack document sharing and meeting tracking platform with AI-powered features, user management, and secure access control designed for seamless collaboration across organizations.
projectFeatures: Secure document sharing and management system
AI-powered document insights and recommendations
Meeting scheduling and tracking across teams
Role-based access management for users
Real-time collaboration and document updates
Advanced search and filtering for documents and meetings
Full CRUD operations for documents, meetings, and users
Dashboard analytics for document activity and meetings
projectOverview: Resolution Pro is a full stack collaboration platform designed to simplify document sharing, meeting management, and organizational communication. The application enables teams to upload, manage, and share documents securely while maintaining structured meeting records and collaboration workflows. It integrates AI-powered capabilities to provide intelligent insights, automate document processing, and enhance productivity. Built using modern web technologies, the platform focuses on scalability, security, and seamless user experience for enterprise-level collaboration.
projectKeyFeatures:
AI-assisted document management
Meeting scheduling and tracking system
Role-based user access control
Secure document sharing and storage
Interactive dashboard with activity insights
Advanced search and filtering features
Full collaboration tools for teams
projectTimeLine:
Planning & System Design - Architecture planning and feature specification
Phase 1 Development - Backend APIs and database schema
Phase 2 Development - Frontend UI and document management features
Phase 3 Integration - AI integration, authentication, and collaboration tools
Deployment - Production deployment using Vercel and Render
projectStandOutFeatures: Resolution Pro stands out by combining document sharing, meeting management, and AI-powered insights in a single collaboration platform. The integration of AI enhances document understanding and workflow automation, making it highly efficient for teams managing large volumes of documents and meetings.
projectChallenges:
Designing a scalable document storage and management system
Implementing secure role-based access control
Handling large document uploads and storage efficiently
Ensuring smooth real-time collaboration features
Integrating AI features without affecting performance
projectLessonsLearned:
Improved understanding of full stack architecture and scalable application design
Learned secure authentication and authorization strategies
Enhanced experience in building collaboration-based web platforms
Gained practical knowledge of integrating AI features into production applications
projectFuturePlans:
Add real-time document editing and collaborative commenting
Implement AI-powered meeting summaries
Introduce notification and reminder systems
Add enterprise-level integrations with tools like Slack and Google Drive
Develop a desktop version using Electron
